wordplay_note: A seeker of beauty trapped in an ugly job
card_description: Ted Schoenheit (meaning "Schoenheit = beauty (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Galactic Pot-Healer*. Pot-healer (ceramic repairman) recruited by an alien god to raise a sunken cathedral. Name note: A seeker of beauty trapped in an ugly job. The craftsman called to a cosmic task — humble skill in service of the divine. First appears in *Galactic Pot-Healer*.

reference.brief: Pot-healer (ceramic repairman) recruited by an alien god to raise a sunken cathedral
reference.significance: The craftsman called to a cosmic task — humble skill in service of the divine
